title: AI UI tools broke my React flow — here’s why
meta_description: Cut frontend component delivery 75% with AI UI tools — but expect to refactor 60% for accessibility, responsive design, and state integration. Real benchmarks, prompts, and CI setups from a 2026 production team.
prewritten_tweet:
AI UI tools cut component delivery from 2 days to 4 hours — but teams still spend 30-60 minutes fixing accessibility, responsive behavior, and state integration.
